title: Kev's Earth & Sky
description: Introduces brand-new vibrant sky colors and unique fog effects to your world!
body:
My Earth and Sky Pack introduces unique sky colors for almost every biome! Ranging from taiga biomes with a small purple tint that reminisce the beta days, and the ocean sides inspired by the 2000s beach aesthetics. (~~nostalgia bait to the max~~)

This pack is forked off of [Fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous), meaning it also includes unique biome fog effects, affected by the weather and time of day!

While this pack can be used in vanilla playthroughs, there's a small handful of mod support I'd **HIGHLY** recommend playing with!

Featuring:

[Abundant Atmosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundant-atmosphere)

[NewWorld](https://modrinth.com/mod/new_world)

[No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)

[Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)


Also use [Smooth Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-skies)! It smooths out the skybox to your liking!

![mod requirement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74cedb1236603fbeb359c9fa1d601446f4014261.webp)

2.0 version coming soon with foliage changes, water colors, and more mod support!!!
